title: Dora
desc: A father and daughter purchase an old run-down vintage car. However, unbeknownst to them, the car is possessed by a dangerous revenge-seeking spirit.

title: Biriyani
desc: Sugan and Parasuram leave Varadharajan's party drunk in search of a place to have biryani. Soon, they get into some serious trouble when they find a corpse in the trunk of their car.

title: Magic Oven
desc: A renowned chef shares and demonstrates the method to prepare various delicious recipes that can be easily made at home.

title: Thommanum Makkalum
desc: A thief and his family decide to mend their ways and start afresh. Things take an awry turn when they find themselves embroiled in local issues.

title: Ushiran
desc: Murugavel, a police officer, learns that his younger brother is a petty criminal working for a local gangster. When he tries to bring about a positive change in him, the brother tries to kill him.

title: Odela 2
desc: When a rapist is improperly buried, his ghost begins haunting his village and attacking innocent women. As chaos arises, the villagers look for an answer.
